About-the-DQA-description: 資料品質等級總結了 iNaturalist 觀察紀錄作為生物多樣性資料的準確性、精確性、完整性、相關性與適切性。某些屬性是自動判定的，而其他屬性則需由 iNaturalist 用戶投票決定。iNaturalist 將經由授權的「研究等級(Research Grade)」之觀察紀錄分享給資料夥伴，以用於科學研究和保育工作。
Add-location-for-better-identifications: 新增位置以便得到更佳的鑑定
ADD-LOCATION-FOR-BETTER-IDS: 新增位置以獲得更佳的鑑定
Advanced--interface-mode-with-explainer: 進階（可上傳多張照片與聲音）
After-capturing-or-importing-photos-show: 拍攝或匯入照片後，顯示：
Agree-with-ID-description: 是否確認該鑑定並採用以下鑑定上之建議？
All-observation-options: 所有觀察紀錄選項（包含 iNaturalist AI 相機、標準相機、從相簿匯入，以及錄音裝置）
All-observations-submitted-to-iNaturalis: 所有提交至愛自然(iNaturalist)的觀察紀錄需要有日期和位置，才能對科學家有所幫助。如果他們需要更多資訊，請更新您的觀察紀錄。
An-Internet-connection-is-required: 需保持網路連線以載入更多觀察記錄
Anyone-using-iNaturalist-can-see: 所有使用愛自然的人都可檢視觀察到此物種的位置，科學家也能最方便地用這些資料來研究。
Are-you-an-educator: 您是想和學生一起使用愛自然的教育工作者嗎？
Are-you-sure-you-want-to-log-out: Are you sure you want to log out of your iNaturalist account? All observations that haven’t been uploaded to iNaturalist will be deleted.
As-you-upload-more-observations: As you upload more observations, others in our community may be able to help you identify them!
By-exiting-changes-not-saved: By exiting, changes to your observation will not be saved.
By-exiting-observation-not-saved: By exiting, your observation will not be saved.
By-exiting-your-observations-not-saved: By exiting, your observations will not be saved. You can save them to your device, or you can delete them.
By-exiting-your-photos-will-not-be-saved: By exiting, your photos will not be saved.
By-exiting-your-recorded-sound-will-not-: By exiting, your recorded sound will not be saved.
By-uploading-your-observation-to-iNatura: By uploading your observation to iNaturalist, you can:
Congrats-on-making-your-first-observatio: Congrats on making your first observation!
Connect-with-other-naturalists: Connect with other naturalists and engage in conversations.
Connection-problem-Please-try-again-late: Connection problem. Please try again later.
Could-not-find-a-camera-on-this-device: Could not find a camera on this device
Create-an-observation-evidence: Create an observation with no evidence
Data-quality-assessment-can-taxon-still-: Based on the evidence, can the Community Taxon still be improved?
Data-quality-assessment-community-taxon-: Community taxon at species level or lower
Data-quality-assessment-description-casu: This observation has not met the conditions for Research Grade status.
Data-quality-assessment-description-need: This observation has not yet met the conditions for Research Grade status:
Data-quality-assessment-description-rese: It can now be used for research and featured on other websites.
Data-quality-assessment-id-supported-by-: 有兩個或以上鑑定支持
Data-quality-assessment-single-subject: 與單一觀察對象相關的證據
Device-storage-full-description: iNaturalist may not be able to save your photos or may crash.
Do-you-know-what-group-this-is-in: Do you know what group this is in?
During-app-start-no-model-found: During app start there was no computer vision model found. There will be no AI camera.
Edit-your-profile-change-your-settings: Edit your profile, change your notifications settings, and manage all other parts of your account.
Error-voting-in-DQA-description: Your vote may not have been cast in the DQA. Check your internet connection and try again.
Every-observation-needs: Every observation needs a location, date, and time to be helpful to identifiers. You can edit geoprivacy if you’re concerned about location privacy.
Every-time-a-collection-project: Every time a collection project's page is loaded, iNaturalist will perform a quick search and display all observations that match the project's requirements. It is an easy way to display a set of observations, such as for a class project, a park, or a bioblitz without making participants take the extra step of manually adding their observations to a project.
Filter-by-observed-between-dates: Filter by observations observed between two specific dates
Filter-by-observed-during-months: Filter by observations observed during specific months
Filter-by-observed-on-date: Filter by observations observed on a specific date
Filter-by-uploaded-between-dates: Filter by observations uploaded between two specific dates
Filter-by-uploaded-on-date: Filter by observations uploaded on a specific date
Flag-Item-Description: Flagging brings something to the attention of volunteer site curators. Please don't flag problems you can address with identifications, the Data Quality Assessment, or by talking to the person who made the content.
Flag-Item-Other-Description: 您可在下方說明一些其它原因。
Flag-Item-Other-Input-Hint: 指名您標記此項目的原因
Get-more-accurate-suggestions-create-use: Get more accurate suggestions & create useful data for science using your location
Get-your-identification-verified-by-real: Get your identification verified by real people in the iNaturalist community
Getting-an-even-more-accurate-ID: Getting an even more accurate ID...
Group-photos-onboarding: Group photos into observations– make sure there is only one species per observation
How-does-it-feel-to-identify: How does it feel to identify and connect to the nature around you?
I-agree-to-the-Terms-of-Use: <0>I agree to the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy, and I have reviewed the Community Guidelines (</0><1>required</1><0>).</0>
Identify-record-learn: Identify, record, and learn about every living species on earth using iNaturalist
If-an-account-with-that-email-exists: If an account with that email exists, we've sent password reset instructions to your email.
If-you-have-an-existing-account-try-sign: If you have an existing iNat account, try signing in with your username and password, or try resetting your password using the email address associated with your account.
If-you-leave-x-of-your-observations-remo:
If you leave this traditional project, { $count ->
  [one] 1 of your observations
 *[other] { $count } of your observations
} will also be removed from this project.
If-you-took-the-original-photo-you-can-h: If you took the original photo of the organism, you can help train iNaturalist to identify this species by saving and uploading it to iNaturalist, where the community can help identify it.
If-you-want-to-collate-compare-promote: If you want to collate, compare, or promote a set of existing projects, then an Umbrella project is what you should use. For example the 2018 City Nature Challenge, which collated over 60 projects, made for a great landing page where anyone could compare and contrast each city's observations. Both Collection and Traditional projects can be used in an Umbrella project, and up to 500 projects can be collated by an Umbrella project.
If-youre-seeing-this-error: If you're seeing this and you're online, iNat staff have already been notified. Thanks for finding a bug! If you're offline, please take a screenshot and send us an email when you're back on the Internet.
IMPROVE-THESE-SUGGESTIONS-BY-USING-YOUR-: IMPROVE THESE SUGGESTIONS BY USING YOUR LOCATION
iNat-is-global-community: iNaturalist is a global community of naturalists creating open data for science by collectively observing & identifying organisms
iNaturalist-can-save-photos-you-take-in-: iNaturalist can save photos you take in the app to your device’s photo library.
iNaturalist-has-no-ID-suggestions-for-th: iNaturalist has no ID suggestions for this photo.
iNaturalist-helps-you-identify: iNaturalist helps you identify the plants and animals around you while generating data for science and conservation. Get connected with a community of millions scientists and naturalists who can help you learn more about nature!
iNaturalist-identification-suggestions-a: iNaturalist's identification suggestions are based on observations and identifications made by the iNaturalist community, including { $user1 }, { $user2 }, { $user3 }, and many others.
iNaturalist-is-a-501: iNaturalist is a 501(c)(3) non-profit in the United States of America (Tax ID/EIN 92-1296468).
iNaturalist-is-supported-by: iNaturalist is supported by an independent, 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization based in the United States of America. The iNaturalist platform includes this app, Seek by iNaturalist, the iNaturalist website, and more.
iNaturalist-is-supported-by-our-communit: iNaturalist is supported by our amazing community. From everyday naturalists who add observations and identifications, to curators who manage our taxonomy and help with moderation, to the volunteer translators who make iNaturalist more accessible to worldwide audiences, to our community-based donors, we are extraordinarily grateful to all the people in our community who make iNaturalist the platform it is.
iNaturalist-mission-is-to-connect: iNaturalist's mission is to connect people to nature and advance biodiversity science and conservation.
iNaturalist-users-who-have-left-an-ident: iNaturalist users who have left an identification on another user's observation
iNaturalist-users-who-have-observed: iNaturalist users who have observed a particular taxon at a particular time and place
iNaturalist-uses-your-location-to-give-y: iNaturalist uses your location to give you better identification suggestions and we can automatically add a location to your observations, which helps scientists. We also use it to help you find organisms observed near your location.
iNaturalists-apps-are-designed-and-devel: iNaturalist's apps are designed, developed, and supported by the iNaturalist team: Yaron Budowski, Amanda Bullington, Tony Iwane, Johannes Klein, Patrick Leary, Joanne Lin, Scott Loarie, Abhas Misraraj, Sylvain Morin, Carrie Seltzer, Alex Shepard, Thea Skaff, Angie Ta, Ken-ichi Ueda, Kirk van Gorkom, Jason Walthall, & Jane Weeden.
iNaturalists-vision-is-a-world: iNaturalist's vision is a world where everyone can understand and sustain biodiversity through the practice of observing wild organisms and sharing information about them.
Individual-encounters-with-organisms: Individual encounters with organisms at a particular time and location, usually with evidence
It-can-now-be-shared-for-use-in-research: It can now be shared for use in research
It-may-take-up-to-an-hour-to-remove-cont: It may take up to an hour to completely delete all associated content
Join-the-largest-community-of-naturalist: Join the largest community of naturalists in the world!
Just-make-sure-the-organism-is-wild: Just make sure the organism is wild (not a pet, zoo animal, or garden plant)
Lat-Lon-Acc: Lat: { NUMBER($latitude, maximumFractionDigits: "6") }, Lon: { NUMBER($longitude, maximumFractionDigits: "6") }, Acc: { $accuracy }
Loads-content-that-requires-an-Internet-: Loads content that requires an Internet connection
Location-accuracy-is-too-imprecise: Location accuracy is too imprecise to help identifiers. Please zoom in.
Log-in-to-contribute-your-observations: Log in to contribute your observations to science!
Login-sub-title: Document living things, identify organisms & contribute to science
maverick--identification: 對此分類群具不同看法
No-email-app-installed-body: If you have another way of sending email, the address is { $address }
No-email-app-installed-body-check-other: Try checking your email in a web browser or on another device.
No-Notifications-Found: You have no notifications! Get started by creating your own observations.
No-results-found-for-that-search: No results found for that search.
No-results-found-try-different-search: No results found. Try a different search or adjust your filters.
Not-enough-space-left-on-device: Not enough space left on device
Not-enough-space-left-on-device-try-agai: There is not enough storage space left on your device to do that. Please free up some space and try again.
notifications-user-added-comment-to-obse: <0>{ $userName }</0> added a comment to an observation by you
notifications-user-added-identification-: <0>{ $userName }</0> added an identification to an observation by you
notifications-user1-added-comment-to-obs: <0>{ $user1 }</0> added a comment to an observation by { $user2 }
notifications-user1-added-identification: <0>{ $user1 }</0> added an identification to an observation by { $user2 }
Obervations-must-be-manually-added: Observations must be manually added to a traditional project, either during the upload stage or after the observation has been shared to iNaturalist. A user must also join a traditional project in order to add their observations to it.
Observation-has-no-photos-and-no-sounds: This observation has no photos and no sounds.
Observation-location-obscured-randomized: This observation’s location is obscured. You are seeing a randomized point within the obscuration polygon.
Observation-location-obscured-you-can-se: This observation’s location is obscured. You can always see the location of your own observations.
Observation-location-obscured-you-have-p: This observation’s location is obscured. You have permission to see this location.
Observations-need-location-date--warning: iNaturalist observations need a location and date to be useful to scientists. Please check observations with this icon before uploading.
Observations-on-iNat-are-cited: Observations on iNaturalist are cited in scientific papers, have led to rediscoveries, and help scientists understand life on our planet
Observations-you-upload-to-iNaturalist: Observations you upload to iNaturalist can be used by scientists and researchers worldwide.
Observe-and-identify-organisms-in-real-t: Observe and identify organisms in real time with your camera
Offensive-Inappropriate-Examples: Misleading or illegal content, racial or ethnic slurs, etc. For more on our definition of "appropriate," see the FAQ.
Offline-DQA-description: The DQA may not be accurate. Check your internet connection and try again.
Offline-suggestions-may-differ-from-onli: Offline suggestions may differ from online suggestions, and taxon images and common names may not load.
Once-you-create-and-upload-observations: Once you create & upload observations, other members of our community can add identifications to help your observations reach research grade.
Once-youve-uploaded-to-iNaturalist: Once you’ve uploaded to iNaturalist, other naturalists in our community can help confirm your identifications. Keep an eye on your notifications for updates!
Organisms-that-are-identified-to-species: Organisms that are identified to species rank or below
Other-members-of-our-community-can-verif: Other members of our community can verify and identify your observations if you upload them to iNaturalist.
Photos-you-take-will-appear-here: Photos you take will appear here
Please-make-sure-your-password-is-at-lea: Please make sure your password is at least 6 characters.
Please-try-again-when-you-are-connected-: Please try again when you are connected to the Internet.
Please-try-again-when-you-are-online: Please try again when you are online!
Potential-disagreement-description: <0>Is the evidence enough to confirm this is </0><1></1><0>?<0>
Potential-disagreement-disagree: <0>No, but this is a member of </0><1></1>
Potential-disagreement-unsure: <0>I don't know but I am sure this is </0><1></1>
Pull-to-refresh-and-sync-observations: Pull to refresh and sync observations
Record-organism-sounds-with-the-micropho: Record organism sounds with the microphone
Recording-stopped-Tap-play-the-current-r: Recording stopped. Tap play the current recording.
Save-photos-to-your-photo-library: 儲存照片至您照片圖庫
Saved-Observation: 已儲存觀察記錄，正在佇列上傳中
Scientists-use-citizen-science-data: 科學家使用像您這樣的公民科學資料，以更深入地了解全球的物種。
Search-suggestions-without-location: 不包含位置的搜尋建議
See-all-your-observations-in-explore: See all your observations in explore
See-observations-by-this-user-in-Explore: See observations by this user in Explore
See-observations-of-this-taxon-in-explor: See observations of this taxon in explore
See-species-observed-by-this-user-in-Exp: See species observed by this user in Explore
Select-a-date-and-time-for-observation: Select a date and time for observation
Share-your-observation-where-it-can-help: Share your observation, where it can help scientists across the world better understand biodiversity.
Showing-offline-search-results--taxa: Showing offline search results. To search for more species, try again when connected to the Internet.
Sign-in-with-Apple: 使用 Apple id 登入
Sign-in-with-Apple-Failed: 使用 Apple ID 登入失敗
Sign-in-with-Google-Failed: 用 Google 帳號登入失敗
Skip-additional-suggestions: 略過更多鑑定上的建議
Sorry-this-observation-was-deleted: 抱歉，這筆觀察紀錄已刪除了
Sorry-we-dont-know-how-to-open-that-URL: 抱歉，我們不知道怎麼開啟該 URL: { $url }
sound-recorder-help-A-recording-of: 5–15 秒的錄音最適合幫助鑑定者來鑑定。
sound-recorder-help-Get-as-close-as-you-: 儘可能安全地靠近生物來錄音。
sound-recorder-help-Make-sure: 確保您移動的聲音不會遮蓋掉生物的聲音。
sound-recorder-help-Try-to-isolate: 請試著將單一生物的聲音分離開來。如果無法做到，請記得註明您正在錄製的生物。
Spam-Examples: 商業招攬，無效連結等等。
Start-must-be-before-end: 開始日期必須是結束日期之前。
Stay-on-this-screen: 當載入您的位置時停留在此螢幕上。
Still-need-help: 還需要協助嗎？您可以在此提出請求支援。
Take-multiple-photos-of-a-single-organis: 拍單一生物個體的多張照片
Thank-you-for-sharing-your-feedback: 感謝您分享回饋來協助我們改進！
Thanks-for-using-any-suggestions: 謝謝使用這個 app！您對開發團隊有什麼建議嗎？
That-email-is-already-associated-with-an: 該電子郵件已綁定某一個帳號了。
That-username-is-unavailable: 該使用者名稱無法使用
The-exact-location-will-be-hidden: 對外將隱藏確切位置，而改為籠統而較大的區域（受威脅及瀕危物種的資料將自動模糊化）。
The-iNaturalist-Network: 愛自然國際網路(iNaturalist Network)是一個由多個區域性網站組成的系統，這些網站與全球愛自然的社群緊密相連。這些區域性網站由當地機構所支援，推廣在地的使用，並且協助利用愛自然 的資料以裨益在地的生物多樣性。
The-location-will-not-be-visible-to-othe: 其他人看不到該位置，這可能會使觀察紀錄無法鑑定。
The-models-that-suggest-species: 根據視覺相似性與地理位置來建議物種的模型，部分得益於 Sara Beery、Tom Brooks、Elijah Cole、Christian Lange、Oisin Mac Aodha、Pietro Perona 和 Grant Van Horn 的協作。
This-is-a-wild-organism: 這是一種野生的生物，並非人類圈養或栽培在此地點的。
This-is-how-taxon-names-will-be-displaye: 以下是愛自然上所有分類群名稱顯示的方式：
This-is-your-identification-other-people: 這是您的鑑定。其他人可能會幫忙確認一下！
This-observation-has-no-comments-or-iden: 這筆觀察記錄還沒有評論或者是鑑定。
This-observation-has-not-met-the-conditi: 這筆觀察紀錄尚未達到研究等級所需的條件
This-observation-is-not-eligible-for-res: 這筆觀察紀錄不符合研究等級的狀態。請在下方資料品質評估中來了解更多資訊。
This-observation-is-research-grade-and-c: 這筆觀察紀錄為研究等級，而且科學家可使用！
This-observation-needs-more-identificati: 這筆觀察紀錄需要更多的鑑定以達到研究等級
這筆觀察紀錄需要更多的鑑定以成為研究等級。
This-observer-has-opted-out-of-the-Commu: 此觀察者以排除社群的鑑定
This-organism-was-placed-by-humans: 此生物是被人類帶到此地的。此選項適用於像是花園中的植物，寵物和動物園內的動物等。
To-sync-your-observations-to-iNaturalist: 請登入以同步您的觀察紀錄至愛自然上。
To-view-nearby-organisms-please-enable-l: 要查看附近的生物，請開啟存取位置的權限。
To-view-nearby-projects-please-enable-lo: 要查看附近的專案，請開啟存取位置的權限。
Unreviewed-observations-only: 僅限未檢視過的觀察紀錄
Upload-photos-from-your-photo-library: 從您的照片圖庫中上傳多張照片
Upload-x-observations:
上傳 { $count ->
  [one] 一筆觀察紀錄
 *[other] { $count } 筆觀察紀錄
}
Uploading-x-of-y-observations:
{ $total ->
  [one] 上傳第 { $currentUploadCount } 筆觀察紀錄
 *[other] 上傳 { $total } 筆中的第 { $currentUploadCount } 筆觀察紀錄
}
Use-iNaturalist-to-collect-any-kind-of: 使用愛自然來收集任何種類的植物、昆蟲、蜘蛛、鳥類或其他動物，並把它們新增至您的觀察紀錄中！
Use-iNaturalist-to-identify-any-living-t: 使用愛自然來鑑定任一生物
Use-iNaturalists-AI-Camera: 使用愛自然的 AI 相機來即時鑑定生物
Use-the-devices-other-camera: 使用裝置上其他的相機。
Use-the-iNaturalist-camera-to-observe-2: 使用愛自然來即時觀察和鑑定生物。與我們的社群分享以取得鑑定並貢獻在科學研究上！
Use-your-devices-microphone-to-record: 使用您裝置的麥克風來錄製生物的聲音，並與我們的社群分享以取得鑑定並為科學研究做出貢獻！
USERNAME-OR-EMAIL: 使用者名稱或電子郵件
VIEW-ALL-X-TAXA: 查看全部 { $count } 個分類群
VIEW-ALL-X-USERS: 查看全部 { $count } 位使用者
Watch-your-notifications-for-identificat: 查看您的通知以取得鑑定資訊！
We-are-not-confident-enough-to-make-a-to: 我們對於提供最佳的分類群鑑定之建議沒什麼信心，但以下是其他的一些建議：
Weve-made-some-updates: 我們進行了一些更新，所以我們建議您看一下您的設定。您之後可隨時更新。
Whats-more-by-recording: 更重要的是，透過記錄並分享您的觀察，您將為科學家提供研究等級的資料，協助他們更深入地理解與保護大自然。所以，如果您喜歡記錄戶外的發現，或是單純喜歡學習生命的奧妙，快加入我們吧！
When-tapping-the-green-observation-butto: 當點擊綠色觀察紀錄按鈕時，開啟：
Would-you-like-to-discard-your-current-r: 您是否要捨棄目前的錄音並重來呢？
Would-you-like-to-suggest-the-following-: 您是否要提出以下的鑑定上之建議？

}
X-Observers:
{ $count ->
  [one] { $count } 位觀察者
 *[other] { $count } 位觀察者
}
X-PHOTOS-X-OBSERVATIONS:
{ $photoCount ->
  [one] 一張照片
 *[other] { $photoCount } 張照片
}, { $observationCount ->
  [one] 一筆觀察紀錄
 *[other] { $observationCount } 筆觀察紀錄
}
You-are-offline-Tap-to-reload: You are offline. Tap to reload.
You-are-offline-Tap-to-try-again: You are offline. Tap to try again.
You-can-add-up-to-20-media: You can add up to 20 photos and 20 sounds per observation.
You-can-also-check-out-merchandise: You can also check out merchandise for iNaturalist and Seek at our store below!
You-can-click-join-on-the-project-page: You can click “join” on the project page.
You-can-find-answers-on-our-help-page: You can find answers on our help page.
You-can-only-add-20-photos-per-observati: You can only add 20 photos per observation
You-can-search-observations-of-any-plant: 您可以使用探索(Explore)來搜尋全世界任何地點的植物或動物之觀察紀錄！
You-can-still-share-the-file: You can still share the file with another app. If you can email it, please send it to { $email }
You-can-upload-this-observation-to-our-c: You can upload this observation to our community to get an identification from a real person, and help our AI improve its identifications in the future
You-changed-filters-will-be-discarded: You changed filters, but they were not applied to your explore search results.
You-have-opted-out-of-the-Community-Taxo: You have opted out of the Community Taxon
You-havent-joined-any-projects-yet: You haven’t joined any projects yet!
You-havent-observed-any-species-yet: You haven't observed any species yet.
You-likely-observed-a-new-species: You likely observed a new species!
You-likely-observed-an-organism-in-this-: You likely observed an organism in this group
You-make-an-observation-every-time-you: You make an observation every time you take a picture of an organism with a date and location.
You-may-have-observed-a-new-species: You may have observed a new species!
You-may-have-observed-a-species: You may have observed a species
You-may-have-observed-an-organism-in-thi: You may have observed an organism in this group
You-must-be-logged-in-to-view-messages: You must be logged in to view messages
You-must-install-Google-Play-Services-to: You must install Google Play Services to sign in with Google.
You-need-an-Internet-connection-to-do-th: You need an Internet connection to do that.
You-need-log-in-to-do-that: 您需要登入後才能做這件事。
You-observed-an-organism-in-this-group: 您在此類群中觀察到某個生物。
You-will-see-notifications: 當您登入並上傳觀察紀錄時，您將會在此看到通知。
Your-donation-to-iNaturalist: 您對愛自然的捐款，將支持行動裝置 app 和網站的改善與穩定性，連結了廣大群眾與大自然，並且促進全球生物多樣性的保護！
Your-email-is-confirmed: 您的電子郵件已確認！請登入以繼續使用。
Your-location-uncertainty-is-over-x-km: 您的位置誤差已超過 { $x } km，其值太高以至於對鑑定者沒有助益。編輯位置並放大直到精確度的圓形範圍變成綠色，並位於您觀察該生物的中心。
Your-observations-can-help-scientists: 您的觀察紀錄能幫到科學家！
Your-observations-can-now-help-scientist: 您的觀察紀錄現在能夠協助科學家。
Youre-always-in-control-of-the-location-: 您始終能控制您建立的每筆觀察紀錄之位置隱私權。
Youve-denied-permission-prompt: 您拒絕了許可權。請在設定中授予許可權。
Youve-made-2-observations: 您已建立了兩筆觀察紀錄！
Youve-previously-denied-camera-permissio: 您先前拒絕了開啟相機的權限，所以請在設定中啟用。
Youve-previously-denied-location-permiss: 您先前拒絕了位置的存取權限，所以請在設定中開啟。
Youve-previously-denied-microphone-permi: 您先前拒絕了開啟麥克風的權限，所以請在設定中啟用。
Zoom-in-as-much-as-possible-to-improve: 盡可能放大以提高位置的精確度，並獲得更準確的鑑定結果。
